title: bassia diacantha
intro: Bassia diacantha, also known as desert broom or desert broom grass, is a shrubby plant native to the deserts of North America and the southwestern part of the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bassia diacantha include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from symptoms associated with respiratory conditions such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal use, with some herbalists also recommending it in capsule form as a supplement.
